## Security/privacy checklist

- [ ] No DOM injection of imported HTML in trusted shell
- [ ] No iframe or webview created for parsing/rendering
- [ ] No script execution from imported content
- [ ] No network calls added
- [ ] No telemetry, analytics, or CDN dependency added
- [ ] No sensitive or corporate data committed
- [ ] No weakening of sandbox, CSP, or local-first constraints
